fixes.origin:
args = ["powershell", "-NoProfile", "-Command", f"Get-Process | Select-Object -First 5 | Where-Object {{$_.Name -like '*{term}*'}}"]
proc = subprocess.run(args, capture_output=True, encoding="utf-8")
fixes.replacement:
allowed = {"chrome": "chrome", "python": "python", "explorer": "explorer"}
key = term.lower()
name = allowed.get(key)
if name is None:
    raise ValueError("Unsupported process filter")
args = ["powershell", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "Get-Process -Name " + name + " | Select-Object -First 5"]
proc = subprocess.run(args, capture_output=True, encoding="utf-8")
